title: Phase 4 (Track A): Make backups real before anything else
summary: Ship the only Phase 4 work that's non-negotiable: nightly FalkorDB + Postgres backups to off-VPS storage, a proven restore procedure, and a visible freshness indicator on /admin.
outOfScope: Tracks B-F (observability rollups, dedup audits, new entity types, fallback memory layer, surface polish) - tracked in backlog.json, picked by current pain
technicalConsiderations: Storage default: Cloudflare R2 via rclone (free egress)
New shell script compose/backup/falkordb-backup.sh on a cron / systemd timer
New Postgres table brain.backup_runs for the freshness card
Restore procedure documented in compose/backup/RESTORE.md (a backup that does not restore is worthless)
